cards.front: What is the time complexity of Bubble Sort algorithm?
cards.back: O(n^2) in the worst and average case

cards.front: Which algorithm is an improvement of Selection Sort?
What is the general idea behind Selection Sort algorithm?
cards.back: Find the minimum/maximum element and swap it with the first element

cards.front: What is the time complexity of Insertion Sort algorithm?
cards.back: O(n^2) in the worst case, but O(n) in the best case

cards.front: What is the primary difference between Bubble Sort and Selection Sort?
cards.back: Bubble Sort compares adjacent elements and swaps if necessary, while Selection Sort finds the minimum/maximum element and swaps it with the first element
